name: happy-path-primary
task: Create a candlestick chart widget for displaying OHLC price data. It should support hover tooltips showing open, high, low, close values and a timeframe toggle for 1D, 1W, 1M, 3M, 1Y.
assertions: The component accepts a prop typed as WidgetPayload (or destructures the equivalent fields: title, data, config, interactions)
All color values use CSS custom properties (var(--chart-1), var(--green), var(--red), etc.) — no hardcoded hex color strings in the component
The component renders a timeframe toggle using interactions.timeframe_toggle from the payload
Numeric/data values use the monospace font via var(--font-mono) or a class that maps to JetBrains Mono
The widget card uses border-radius 12px (or the CSS variable equivalent) as specified in the design system
